requirement_topic.en: Local Ivorian Importer / Authorised Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 当地科特迪瓦进口商/授权代理商要求
requirement_topic.zht: 當地科特迪瓦進口商/授權代理商要求

summary.en: A locally registered Ivorian company must act as importer or authorised agent for telecommunications and radio terminal equipment sold in Ivory Coast. The importer or agent is the responsible party for compliance with ARTCI homologation conditions, French-language labelling requirements, and DGDDI customs formalities. The importer's company details (name, address) must appear on product packaging in French. Foreign manufacturers without a local Ivorian entity must appoint an Ivorian importer or legally registered representative before placing products on the market.
summary.zh: 在科特迪瓦销售电信及无线电终端设备，须由在当地注册的科特迪瓦公司担任进口商或授权代理商。进口商或代理商是符合ARTCI同质化条件、法语标注要求及DGDDI海关手续的责任方。产品包装须以法语标注进口商公司信息（名称、地址）。无当地科特迪瓦实体的境外制造商在投放产品前须指定科特迪瓦进口商或合法注册代表。
summary.zht: 在科特迪瓦銷售電信及無線電終端設備，須由在當地註冊的科特迪瓦公司擔任進口商或授權代理商。進口商或代理商是符合ARTCI同質化條件、法語標注要求及DGDDI海關手續的責任方。產品包裝須以法語標注進口商公司資訊（名稱、地址）。無當地科特迪瓦實體的境外製造商在投放產品前須指定科特迪瓦進口商或合法註冊代表。

standards_or_laws: Loi n°2012-293 du 23 mars 2012 relative aux télécommunications (Côte d'Ivoire)

summary.en: China does not require a local importer for domestic sales; the Chinese manufacturer is the responsible party. For export, Chinese exporters typically work through Ivorian trading partners or distributors, but no formal ARTCI-mandated representative registration equivalent exists in the Chinese regulatory framework.
summary.zh: 中国境内销售无需当地进口商，中国制造商即为责任方。出口时，中国出口商通常通过科特迪瓦贸易伙伴或分销商开展业务，但中国监管框架中无相应的ARTCI规定代表注册正式要求。
summary.zht: 中國境內銷售無需當地進口商，中國製造商即為責任方。出口時，中國出口商通常通過科特迪瓦貿易夥伴或分銷商開展業務，但中國監管框架中無相應的ARTCI規定代表註冊正式要求。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no Chinese equivalent requirement for local importer in destination market

gap.en: Full gap: Chinese manufacturers have no equivalent domestic obligation. A locally registered Ivorian company acting as importer or authorised agent must be appointed and its details included on French-language product packaging before market entry in Ivory Coast.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国制造商无相应的国内义务。进入科特迪瓦市场前，须指定在当地注册的科特迪瓦公司担任进口商或授权代理商，并在法语产品包装上标注其信息。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國製造商無相應的國內義務。進入科特迪瓦市場前，須指定在當地註冊的科特迪瓦公司擔任進口商或授權代理商，並在法語產品包裝上標注其資訊。

source.publisher: ARTCI — Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Ivorian importer or authorised agent is required before placing telecommunications terminal equipment on the Ivorian market. The importer's details must appear on French-language product packaging. Chinese manufacturers have no domestic equivalent obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在将电信终端设备投放科特迪瓦市场前，须指定在当地注册的科特迪瓦进口商或授权代理商。进口商信息须标注在法语产品包装上。中国制造商无相应的国内义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在將電信終端設備投放科特迪瓦市場前，須指定在當地註冊的科特迪瓦進口商或授權代理商。進口商資訊須標注在法語產品包裝上。中國製造商無相應的國內義務。
